videos.headline: Elijah Sarratt reels in go-ahead TD for James Madison
videos.description: Jordan McCloud connects with Elijah Sarratt for a touchdown to give James Madison a 13-7 lead over Troy heading into halftime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Elijah Sarratt reels in go-ahead TD for James Madison) 2023/9/16 ESHEET
